/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_constructor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_push_back.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_pop_back.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_size.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_capacity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_isempty.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_operator_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_assignment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_copy_constructor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_constructor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_push.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_pop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_delete_any.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_size.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_isempty.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_operator_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_copy_constructor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_assignment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_linkedlist/test_linkedlist_userdefined.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/tests/test_vector/test_vector_userdefined.cpp.o -o runTests  lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
